arguments.answer: The perimeter of a square is calculated as 4 times the side length. The implemented function is: def square_perimeter(side): return side * 4. The test cases pass as follows: square_perimeter(10) == 40, square_perimeter(5) == 20, square_perimeter(4) == 16.
